ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_statistics" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded statistics */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed COVID-19 cases */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations due to COVID-19 */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths attributed to COVID-19 */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Regional identifier */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the COVID-19 data */,
  "tested" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 tests conducted */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 recoveries */,
  "vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinations administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded economic statistics */,
  "total_nonfarm" REAL /* Total nonfarm employment figures */,
  "total_private" REAL /* Total private employment figures */,
  "education_and_health_svcs" REAL /* Employment in education and health services */,
  "professional_business_svcs" REAL /* Employment in professional and business services */,
  "trade_transportation_utilities" REAL /* Employment in trade, transportation, and utilities */,
  "pub_admin" REAL /* Employment in public administration */,
  "finance" REAL /* Employment in finance */,
  "leisure_hospitality" REAL /* Employment in leisure and hospitality */,
  "retail" REAL /* Employment in retail */,
  "wholesale" REAL /* Employment in wholesale */,
  "manufacturing" REAL /* Employment in manufacturing */,
  "information" REAL /* Employment in information services */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Sector identifier */,
  "annual_rate" REAL /* Annual rate of change */,
  "seasonal_adjustment" REAL /* Seasonal adjustment */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, economic analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* The table accessed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* User's IP address at the time of access */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* User's device information (e.g., browser type, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the identified trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend observation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend observation */,
  "impacted_sectors" TEXT /* Sectors impacted by the trend (e.g., healthcare, retail) */,
  "sector_impact" REAL /* Impact of the trend on each sector */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the trend occurring */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "detailed_analysis" TEXT /* Detailed analysis and data interpretations */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "related_trends" TEXT /* Trends related to the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission applies */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that the user can access */,
  "can_access" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user can access the table */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission granted to the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "related_data" TEXT /* Related data that triggered the alert */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a notification was sent to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
